name: testTableDisplayWhenCurrencyFilterAppliedWhileOnLastPage
description: Verify that transactions are present in the table when a currency filter is applied on the last page
descriptionHtml: Verify that transactions are present in the table when a currency filter is applied on the last page

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0819.233234.26.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify that transactions are present in the table when a currency filter is applied on the last page

steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Verify: Transactions are present in the table
Select currency EUR from dropdown menu
Verify: Transactions are still present then filter is applied on the last page
